exemplar.title:
How does Collins shape the antagonistâs character arc as influencing the
socio-political development of the setting in
The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes?

How does Collins shape the antagonistâs character arc as influencing the
socio-political development of the setting in
The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Research question is explicitly stated and drives the essayâs structure
Clear outline of the three-part essay provides an effective roadmap
Methodology identifies a solid range of relevant textual and secondary sources
weaknesses: Phrasing is occasionally wordy and key variables remain loosely defined
âSocio-political developmentâ is not operationalized, blurring the scope of analysis
Rationale for selecting philosophical sources is not fully explained
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission meets the criteria for the 3â4 band: the topic is communicated adequately with sufficient clarity, the research question is clearly stated but only partially focused, and the methodology is mostly complete with generally relevant sources. Occasional digressions and lack of operational definitions prevent a higher mark, so a score of 3 accurately reflects an adequate but not fully precise Focus and Method.

strengths: Strong contextualization of The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes and The Hunger Games universe
Accurate and well-integrated quotations support the discussion
Effective use of literary-critical terms in close readings
weaknesses: Secondary sources are listed but not always engaged with in depth
Minor slips in terminology (e.g., conflating âleft melodramaâ with âmelodramaâ)
Some citations lack precise page references
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work demonstrates good knowledge and a coherent understanding of primary and secondary materials, with mostly accurate use of terminology, placing it solidly in the 3â4 band. Uneven depth of engagement with critics and occasional imprecision in concepts and citations limit the performance to the lower half of that band, warranting a score of 3.

strengths: Research draws on a varied set of sources beyond the novel, including interviews and philosophical texts
Sustained argument across a clear three-part structure
Analysis generally links textual evidence to interpretive claims, demonstrating good critical engagement
weaknesses: Occasional drift into plot summary weakens focus on interpretive analysis
Limited deployment of counterarguments and deeper critical evaluation
Some sources (e.g., video-game transmedia) feel tangential to the core research question
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The Critical Thinking criterion sits within the 4â6 band: research is good and mostly relevant, analysis is generally effective with supported conclusions, and an argument is sustained and coherent. The lack of robust counterargument and occasional descriptive passages prevent top-band performance, so a mid-band score of 5 reflects solid but improvable critical thinking.

strengths: Clearly appropriate structure with title page, labeled sections, and works-cited list
Required elements (title, headings, abstract-style introduction) are all present
Logical organization mirrors the research structure, aiding readability
weaknesses: Pagination entries in the table of contents are misaligned, causing confusion
Inconsistent spacing and occasional citation-style variation detract from polish
Superscript formatting issues disrupt the visual flow of text
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation meets the 3â4 band: structure is clearly appropriate and most formal requirements are fulfilled, but formatting lapses (pagination errors, inconsistent styling) limit the work to a solid mid-band performance. A score of 3 acknowledges strong organization tempered by noticeable but non-critical presentation errors.

strandSelections.reasoning: The methodology is recognisably literary: close textual analysis supplemented by secondary criticism and philosophical sources.  The student cites around a dozen external works, indicating some range, yet there is limited discussion of how sources were selected or why particular theorists (e.g., Hobbes, Sartre) are appropriate.  No commentaries on reliability or balance are offered.  This meets âmostly completeâ but not âcomplete and effectiveâ, justifying band 3.

Formal featuresâtitle, word count, headings, MLA-style works citedâare present.  Nevertheless, some formatting lapses occur: superscripts render awkwardly, page numbering is not visible, and inconsistent spacing is evident.  These issues place the work at the lower end of the satisfactory band; score 2.

Research extends beyond the novel, drawing on interviews, journal articles, philosophical texts, and OED definitions, and these sources connect to the question.  However, selection skews heavily toward secondary commentary rather than peer-reviewed literary scholarship, and relevance sometimes drifts (e.g., video-game transmedia).  Overall quality is âgood, mostly relevantâ, corresponding to the 4-6 band; a conservative 4 is assigned.

The student states the topic early, differentiates the antagonistâs arc from its influence on Panem, and maintains this line of enquiry throughout the three-part structure.  Nevertheless, the phrasing is wordy and the key variables (scope of âsocio-political developmentâ) are only loosely delimited, so clarity is sufficient rather than sharp.  Occasional digressions into general dystopian theory blur focus, keeping the work comfortably in the adequate 3-4 band rather than the precise 5-6 band.

An argument is sustained through the three-part structure and revisited in the conclusion.  Evaluation of differing perspectives (e.g., whether dystopia offers hope) is touched on but not deeply critiqued; counter-arguments are rare.  Thus discussion is âgoodâ but not fully critical, aligning with 4-6; a midpoint 4 is given.

Close readings connect quotation to claims, and stylistic devices are identified; the student often explains how techniques affect reader perception.  Yet analysis can become descriptive (plot summary) and some assertions about philosophical influence are asserted rather than evidenced.  Conclusions are âmostly supportedâ, fulfilling the mid band.  Score 4 reflects the lower end of 4-6.

The essay follows expected EE conventions: title page, abstract-style introduction, labelled sections that mirror the novelâs structure, conclusion, works-cited list.  Pagination in the provided extract is unclear but the table of contents suggests logical organisation.  All required elements appear present, so the top presentation band (3-4) is appropriate; 3 is awarded to acknowledge minor inconsistencies (e.g., TOC page numbers mis-aligned).

The essay demonstrates good knowledge of BOTH primary text and wider franchise context; quotations are accurate and generally well integrated.  Secondary material is referenced, yet engagement is often cursory (e.g., listing critics without sustained dialogue).  Coherence is evident but depth remains uneven, placing the work solidly in the 3-4 bracket, nearer the lower edge.

Literary-critical terms such as âanaphoraâ, âpolysyndetonâ, âmotifâ, and âdystopiaâ are used mostly correctly and applied to examples.  Minor slips occur (e.g., âleft melodramaâ conflated with âmelodramaâ), and some philosophical labels are treated loosely.  The usage is therefore âmostly accurateâ, meriting 3.

The research question â âHow does Collins shape the antagonistâs character arc as influencing the socio-political development of the settingâ¦?â â is explicitly stated and clearly drives the essayâs structure.  However, its double action (both âshapingâ and âinfluencingâ) remains broad, and the phrase âsocio-political developmentâ is never operationalised, so focus is partial rather than tight.  Therefore a mid-band 3 is warranted.

annotations.comment: The title is prominently placed and clearly indicates the focus on the antagonistâs arc and setting development, providing a strong opening to the investigation.
The inclusion of a precise word count (3994) demonstrates compliance with the maximum limit requirement.
The research question is explicitly stated on the title page, anchoring the essayâs structure and demonstrating clear connection to the investigation from the outset.
The main title phrase is somewhat wordy and could be streamlined to sharpen focus (e.g., specify âsocio-political developmentâ more precisely).
The Table of Contents lists Part III on page 1 instead of page 11, leading to confusion; please correct the pagination entries.
Align page numbers and section titles consistently in the TOC to improve navigability and presentation.
Page numbers are not visibly shown on the body pages; add clear pagination in the header or footer.
The opening question is broad and general; focus more directly on your defined variables to sharpen the introductionâs relevance.
Consider defining âsocio-political developmentâ explicitly in the introduction to clarify your key variable.
Strong contextualization of TBoSaS and THG, with clear background information supporting reader understanding.
Citation â(Johnson)â lacks a page reference, making it difficult to locate the source passage; include precise page numbers.
Operationalise âsocio-political developmentâ within your methodology or introduction to provide measurable parameters.
Clear outline of essay structure (âthree partsâ¦â) provides effective roadmap for both reader and writer.
The analysis often drifts into plot summary; focus more on interpretation and its relevance to how Collins shapes the setting.
Effective close reading of the metaphor âdance with hungerâ highlights Collinsâ technique and its thematic resonance.
The rationale for selecting Hobbes and other philosophers is not explained; clarify why these theories were chosen.
The shift to Part II lacks transitional signposting; insert a brief linking sentence to maintain coherence.
Insightful analysis of rhetorical questions and pronoun repetition effectively demonstrates shifts in Snowâs emotional state.
To deepen analysis, consider introducing a counterargument about Snowâs moral decline before refuting it.
The use of Margineanâs critique adds valuable scholarly support, reinforcing the argument about narrative potential.
Citation style varies between full inline references and parenthetical mentions; standardise to MLA for consistency.
The video-game transmedia source (Blom) feels tangential to your research question; justify its relevance or replace with more directly related criticism.
The final conclusion reiterates earlier points extensively; consider focusing on synthesising rather than restating section analyses.
A few references to THG lack full bibliographic detail (e.g., â(Collins, THG)â); ensure all citations match the Works Cited format.
The discussion of Sartreâs existentialism is insightful but needs explicit linkage back to how it shapes socio-political development in Panem.
The closing paragraph effectively synthesises literary techniques with thematic critique, giving a strong resolution to your argument.
Consider adding a reflective appendix or section on decision-making to demonstrate planning and informed source selection.
Add visible page numbers to each pageâs header or footer to meet formatting conventions and aid navigation.
